title: platform work skill command wrapper
purpose: D4.3 defines platform work skill command wrapper for the agent-driven expert system. Platform evolution — promotion ladder, parallel queue, reuse.
scope: Owns `D4.3` only; siblings under `D4` must not duplicate this spec.
Aligns with minimal HITL: H1 plan, H2 blocker, H3 sign-off ([INTRO-1.2](INTRO-1.2-human-touchpoint-contract-h1-h2-h3.md)).
Conflicts resolve in favor of [Vision §6 — Branch D — Platform evolution plane (parallel queue)](../../full-automation-vision-and-hierarchy.md#6-branch-d-platform-evolution-plane-parallel-queue).
behavior_steps: When the promotion queue targets skill or command wrapper work, an economy worker packages promoted L2 scripts plus journal-keeper hooks into `.cursor/skills/` or command entry points the conductor invokes by name.

Wrapper surfaces call S0 scripts by path, cite playbook locations, and encode allowed_reads, evidence requirements, and forbidden paths consistent with [B5.1](B5.1-active-role-from-template-pack.md)—never duplicating script logic inside SKILL.md.
User-facing commands register in operator dashboard docs when pack policy requires operator discoverability.
The verifier runs the promotion verify pattern; on pass the conductor dequeues the item and product turns may compose the new surface via [B4.3](B4.3-compose-first-catalog-before-improvise.md).
Failed wrapper verify, a partial SKILL without command, or pack binding mismatch leaves the item open—re-enqueue until both surfaces exist or pack policy declares skill-only.

narrative: D4.3 defines platform work skill command wrapper for the agent-driven expert system. Platform evolution — promotion ladder, parallel queue, reuse. In practice, the system when the promotion queue targets skill or command wrapper work, an economy worker packages promoted l2 scripts plus journal-keeper hooks into `.cursor/skills/` or command entry points the conductor invokes by name, then wrapper surfaces call s0 scripts by path, cite playbook locations, and encode allowed_reads, evidence requirements, and forbidden paths consistent with [b5.1](b5.1-active-role-from-template-pack.md)—never duplicating script logic inside skill.md.
reader_narrative:
<!-- prose-source: agent plane-d 2026-06-28 -->

Skill and command wrapper work packages L2 scripts plus journal-keeper hooks into L3 `.cursor/skills/` or `/commands` entry points—thin orchestration surfaces the conductor invokes by name. Wrappers encode allowed_reads, evidence requirements, and forbidden paths consistent with active role ([B5.1](B5.1-active-role-from-template-pack.md)).

Wrapper promotion does not duplicate script logic inside SKILL.md; it calls S0 scripts and cites playbook paths. New commands register in operator dashboard docs when user-facing. Failed wrapper verify leaves queue item open; partial SKILL without command or vice versa re-enqueues until both surfaces exist or pack policy declares skill-only.
